name: A.A.A. Aktiengesellschaft Allgemeine Anlageverwaltung
summary: A.A.A. Aktiengesellschaft Allgemeine Anlageverwaltung engages in the acquisition, development, rental, leasing, administration, and sale of real estate properties in Germany and internationally. The company was founded in 1890 and is based in Frankfurt am Main, Germany. A.A.A. Aktiengesellschaft Allgemeine Anlageverwaltung is a subsidiary of Rothenberger 4xS Verm√É¬∂gensverwaltung GmbH.
